faqAccountNewVehicleA: Go to Settings → Vehicles and submit the required documents for your new vehicle.
faqAccountNewVehicleQ: How do I add a new vehicle?
faqAccountPhotoA: Open Settings → Profile and upload a clear photo of yourself.
faqAccountPhotoQ: How do I update my profile photo?
faqAccountSwitchVehicleA: Yes. Choose the default vehicle before going online.
faqAccountSwitchVehicleQ: Can I switch between multiple vehicles?
faqDeliveriesMarkJobA: Open the active job card and tap the action button to change the job status. Add photos if requested.
faqDeliveriesMarkJobQ: How do I mark a job as picked up or delivered?
faqDeliveriesRecipientUnavailableA: Try calling the recipient two times, wait 5–10 minutes, then report the issue via the job details screen.
faqRecipientUnavailableQuestion: Recipient is unavailable, what should I do?
faqDeliveriesRerouteA: Contact support in chat for approval. Some jobs do not allow mid-route changes.
faqDeliveriesRerouteQ: Can I re-route a delivery mid trip?
faqGeneralDocsCompany: Trade license or business registration document
faqGeneralDocsCompanyIntro: If you're signing up as a Courier Company, you may also need to provide:
faqGeneralDocsIntro: To ensure safety and compliance, we ask all couriers and riders to upload the following documents during sign-up:
faqGeneralDocsOutro: All documents are reviewed securely, and your profile will be verified within 24–48 hours.
faqDocumentsRequiredQuestion: What documents are required during onboarding?
faqGeneralDocsRequirement1: Valid Government-Issued ID (e.g., Emirates ID, passport)
faqGeneralDocsRequirement2: Driver's License (for motorbike or vehicle-based deliveries)
faqGeneralDocsRequirement4: Vehicle Insurance (if required by your region or job type)
faqGeneralDocsRequirements: Accurate pickup and delivery contact details
Clear parcel description and declared value
faqGeneralPerKmA: Go to Settings → Pricing in the app and adjust your per-km and per-stop rates. Changes apply to new jobs.
faqGeneralPerKmQ: How do I set or update my per km rate?
faqGeneralSignupA: Sign up from the app or web portal, fill your profile details, and submit the required documents for approval.
faqSignupQuestion: How do I sign up as a courier or rider?
faqPaymentsCodA: Yes. Cash jobs will show a COD badge and reconciliation steps.
faqPaymentsCodQ: Do you support cash on delivery?
faqPaymentsHistoryA: Open Wallet from the menu to view detailed statements.
faqPaymentsHistoryQ: Where can I see my earning history?
faqPaymentsPaidA: Payouts are processed weekly to your registered bank account.
faqGetPaidQuestion: When and how do I get paid?
faqSearchPlaceholder: Search FAQs, delivery issues, or account help...
faqAcceptJobQuestion: How do I accept or reject a job?
faqTopicAcceptJobBody: Open the new job card and tap Accept to take it or Reject to skip. You can view details before deciding.
faqTopicCantReachBody: Try calling twice and wait a few minutes. If still unreachable, report an issue from the job details.
faqTopicForgotPassword: I forgot my password — what do I do?
faqTopicForgotPasswordBody: Use the Forgot Password link on the login screen to receive a reset email and set a new password.
faqTopicGetPaidBody: Payouts are processed weekly to your saved bank account. Check Wallet for pending and completed payouts.
faqMarkDeliveredQuestion: How do I mark a job as delivered?
faqTopicMarkDeliveredBody: From the active job, tap Mark Delivered and optionally upload a proof-of-delivery photo and recipient name.
faqTroubleshootLocationA: Grant location permission and set it to “Always Allow” for accurate tracking.
faqTroubleshootNotificationsA: Enable notifications in your phone settings and within the app preferences.
faqTroubleshootSlowAppA: Try force closing and reopening the app. Ensure you have stable internet.
faqTroubleshootSlowAppQ: The app is slow or stuck

settingsTermsBody:
Usage and Privacy Policies for the Application
Boxy Go (بوكسي غو)

Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

Last Updated: November 25, 2025
This agreement forms a legally binding contract between you ("the User" or "you") and Techno Commerce Solutions LTD � Boxy Go Application ("the Company" or "we" or "us"). This agreement regulates your access to our digital platform ("the Platform") and your use of the services provided through it - including postal parcel delivery services (through service and delivery centers and through direct delivery by the Company's representatives or its contractors). By using the Platform, you agree to comply with these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these Terms, please stop using it immediately.

1. Scope and Acceptance
These Terms include:
Parcel Delivery Services: Connecting senders and recipients of parcels (consignees) and providers of parcel delivery and distribution services affiliated with the Company or independent contractors ("Coordinator" / "Coordinators" / "Captain" or "Captains").
Non-Delivery Related Services: Include digital payment solutions services, and other services related to receiving packaging, transporting, and delivering parcels.
Privacy Practices: How your personal data is collected, used, stored, and protected.
By using the Platform, you explicitly agree to all provisions contained in this agreement, including the supplementary policies for specific services. Nothing in this agreement is repeated except when necessary to apply similar provisions to both types of services.

2. Definitions
The Company: Techno Commerce Solutions LTD, owner of the Boxy Go application.
The Platform: Our website, mobile phone applications, and related electronic resources that enable you to access and use our services.
User / Account Holder: Any individual who registers and uses the Platform.
Parcel Delivery Services: Services that enable the user (sender of the parcel) to arrange a delivery service for the parcel to (the consignee).
Non-Delivery Related Services: Such as in-app payment solution services, and other related services provided via the Platform.
Representatives: Independent contractors who provide services for receiving, delivering, transporting, and distributing parcels. They are not employees or agents of the Company.
Partner: External companies (for example, companies delivering goods and parcels between cities) that may be collaborated with to provide the parcel delivery service properly.
Fees: The amounts (including applicable taxes) that you agree to pay for the services.
Discount Codes: Promotional discounts which, if offered, are subject to additional terms.
Content: Any text, graphics, images, sound, video, or other materials presented on the Platform.

3. User Account, Eligibility, and Use of the Platform
3.1. Registration and Account Security
You must create an account to access our services and agree to provide complete, accurate, and updated information.
You must be at least 18 years old (or the legal age of majority in your area) and capable of forming a legally binding contract.
You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. Please notify us immediately if you suspect any unauthorized use.
3.2. Permitted Use
You may use the Platform for the purposes of parcel delivery in all its forms, according to the weights and sizes specified on the Platform, and in conformity with the contents of parcels permitted for transport within the territories of the Syrian Arab Republic.
You must comply with all applicable laws and avoid any abusive, fraudulent, or harmful behavior. Misusing the Platform, including unauthorized attempts to access or disrupt the Platform, is strictly prohibited.

4. Services Provided
4.1. Parcel Delivery Services
Intermediation: The Platform connects parcel senders with independent "Representatives." All parcel delivery services are provided by these Representatives.
Independent Contractor: The Representatives are independent contractors; the Company does not directly employ them, control them, or guarantee their performance beyond providing the technological connection.
4.2. Non-Delivery Related Services
Scope: The Platform also facilitates requesting delivery services, including document delivery within the same city and between cities in Syria.
Goods Restrictions and Non-Transportable Items: For parcel delivery requests, prohibited items include: prohibited materials, cash, gold, jewelry, or any high-value goods. Additionally, the declared value of any delivery order must not exceed 1,000,000 Syrian Pounds.
Execution: Depending on the service, the delivery process may be carried out by various types of Representatives (using different means of transport) and the Company acts as a technical intermediary monitoring the parcel's route from the point of receipt to the point of delivery.
Order Modification: Once an order is submitted, it may not be possible to change the delivery address or order details. Please ensure all details are correct before sending.

5. Payment Terms
Processing: Fees for services are clearly displayed on the payment page and are due for payment via the payment methods provided on the Platform (such as cash, credit/debit cards, and digital wallets).
Pre-Authorization: In some cases, we may pre-authorize an estimated amount on your payment method to ensure sufficient funds are available.
Promotional Offers: Any discount codes or promotional offers are applied according to their specific terms and may not be combined unless explicitly permitted.
Refunds and Cancellations: Fees are generally final and non-refundable, unless the order process is canceled by the Company according to the circumstances mentioned herein. In case of order cancellation, any refunds will be processed using the same payment method used in the original transaction.

6. Privacy Policy
6.1. Data Collection
Information You Provide: Includes registration data, contact information, and any documents submitted (for example, image of parcel contents, image of the external parcel).
Automated Data: We collect data generated from your use of our services, including geographic location, device information, transaction records, and usage statistics.
User-Generated Content: Messages, comments, ratings, and other data you share via the Platform.
6.2. Data Use
Service Provision: Your information is used to operate and improve our services, verify identities (for security and compliance purposes), and process payments.
Improvement: We analyze usage data to improve and personalize the user experience.
Communication: You may receive service updates, notifications, and marketing messages (according to your consent).
6.3. Data Sharing and Protection
Third Parties: We may share your data with trusted service providers and partners solely for the purpose of facilitating the provision of your services. Those parties are contractually bound to maintain data confidentiality.
Legal Compliance: We may disclose your information if required by law or to protect our rights.
Security: We implement technical and organizational measures with industry standards to protect your data, and while we strive to protect it, no electronic system is 100% secure.

7. Disclaimer; Limitation of Liability; and Indemnification
7.1. Disclaimer
"As Is" Basis: All services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without any warranties, whether express or implied, including warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement.
Third-Party Providers: The Company does not guarantee the performance of the Representative or the services provided by partners in terms of quality and reliability.
7.2. Limitation of Liability
General Limitation: The Company or its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the Platform or the services.
Maximum Liability: To the extent permitted by law, the Company's total liability for any claim shall not exceed the value of the fees collected from the original transaction.
7.3. Indemnification
You agree to indemnify and hold harmless the Company, its affiliates, its officers, directors, agents, and employees from any claims, damages, or losses (including legal fees) resulting from your use of the Platform, your breach of these Terms, or your violation of any law.

8. Dispute Resolution and Governing Law
Governing Law: This agreement shall be interpreted according to the laws of the applicable local jurisdiction.
Dispute Resolution: Any disputes arising from this agreement or the services shall first be referred to a mediation mechanism. If disputes are not resolved within sixty (60) days, they shall be resolved by binding arbitration according to the agreed-upon rules. All arbitration proceedings and related documents shall be treated confidentially.
Waiver of Jury Trial: You agree to waive your right to a jury trial and to participate as a member in any class action or representative action in any lawsuit related to this agreement.

9. General Provisions
Amendments: The Company reserves the right to update these Terms and Privacy Policy at any time by publishing the amended versions on the Platform. Your continued use of the Platform constitutes your acceptance of the changes.
Notices: Notices related to this agreement may be sent to the contact information associated with your account.
Severability: If any provision of this agreement is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in effect.
Entire Agreement: This document, along with the Privacy Policy and any supplementary terms, constitutes the entire agreement between you and the Company regarding your use of the Platform.
Assignment/Transfer: Neither you nor the Company may transfer or assign any rights or obligations under this agreement without prior written consent.

10. Contact Information
For inquiries, concerns, or requests related to this agreement or our privacy policies, please contact us at:
Email:
And through the channels mentioned on our platform.

11. Acknowledgement
By accessing and using the Company's Platform and its services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this agreement, including the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy stated above. If you do not agree to any part of this agreement, you must stop using our services immediately.
